summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a Fall ’77 show with blazing Fire on the Mountain and soaring Terrapin Station
review: The reviewer raves about the dramatically improved sound quality, calling it “eons better” than other sources, and praises the performance—Fire earns its name and Terrapin builds from angelic to majestic. Both the recording and the musical delivery are described as top‑notch with no complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights a stellar performance (Fire, Terrapin) and an excellent soundboard recording; the limited sample size lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound described as dramatically clearer than other downloads; no issues noted, crisp and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong Fall ’77 vibe; the set builds nicely with highlighted peaks at Fire and Terrapin.
